spec_match.rationale: Accurately reflects the new SpeechRecognition.quality API surface and related features in the generated code.

interactive.rationale: Interactive sliders, check boxes, and dropdowns update the generated code in real-time, with a working live recognition test panel.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept page matches the description of a live configuration builder and code generator.

edge_cases.rationale: Provides excellent progressive enhancement feedback if SpeechRecognition is available but the quality property is missing.

references.rationale: The parent index.html contains the required ChromeStatus reference link.

design_system.rationale: Adheres to the design system, utilizing standard CSS variables and properly styled inputs and buttons.
